title: trachyrhizum ansusanum
intro: Trachyrhizum ansusanum, also known as Korean wormwood, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Trachyrhizum ansusanum include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Trachyrhizum ansusanum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
